title: taraxacum cephalum
intro: Taraxacum cephalum, also known as the lesser dandelion or hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum cephalum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum cephalum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
